race.comment: BEL LUPA (5) resumes for her second campaign. Three runs last time in were good, placing in two of them before tackling a good maiden and being sent for a spell. She's won a trial nicely leading in this time around and will take holding out. MISS ELLANEOUS (10) resumes. She didn't really fire in two runs last time in but they were in hot maidens and she can be an improver this time around. CABARET QUEEN (6) resumes having run a good race on debut, beaten five lengths but in very slick time at Mornington, beating the rest on that occasion. She's got good upside and will take a power of catching. BEAU STRADA (4) resumes having shown good ability last time in. She maps ideally and can make her presence felt. IMMORTAL TRUTH (9) resumes with claims off a trial win.
